description_long: This is a high-top athletic sneaker featuring a bold color palette of pastel purple, teal, and black, accented with white and a touch of gold on the tongue. The upper is constructed from synthetic materials with perforations on the toe box for breathability and layered panels for structural support. The midsole is thick and sculpted, with the word 'FLOWER' printed on the outer side, suggesting a designer or themed edition. The shoe has a padded collar and tongue for comfort, and black laces in a standard criss-cross pattern. The outsole is white with black accents and appears to be made of durable rubber, designed for traction and support. The overall design is modern and eye-catching, suitable for urban streetwear or casual athletic use.
description: A high-top sneaker in pastel purple, teal, and black with a sculpted white sole and 'FLOWER' branding, featuring black laces and a padded collar. The design is modern, colorful, and suitable for urban streetwear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the 'FLOWER' branding on the midsole, layered panels, and the full color scheme.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the black criss-cross laces, perforated toe box, and gold-accented tongue.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the layered construction and sculpted sole without the 'FLOWER' branding.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the padded collar, teal heel accent, and heel tab.
